story.text:
# 🚪 mysword (Swordsman · Privacy Blade)
**gateway** · swordsman · knowledge

Chrome MV3 extension — the Swordsman agent operationalized (swordsman-blade · v0.1.0 · local). Prover/enforcer: receives the Mage's proposals over the encrypted ceremony channel (ECDH handshake), gates forging via checkCanForge, asserts MyTerms SD-BASE agreements, renders the canvas (spring-physics orb · cursor overlay), and verifies the UOR identity neg(bnot(x)) = succ(x). Does not read page content — that is the Mage's side of the Gap.
